mnemonics: Many People Create Incredible Puzzles Daily To Unlock Nodes
Mike's Pizza Creates Incredible Paths Daily To Unlock Nodes
keyPoints: A point-to-point network consists of three nodes (A, B, C) and duplex links between them.
Each node can send and receive data at the same time, reducing congestion and increasing network efficiency.
To implement such a network, we need to configure the duplex links, set up routing protocols, and ensure network security.
